mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicaldevices (DeviceName, ModelNumber, Category, Manufacturer, RegistrationCert, CostPrice, UnitPrice, StorageRequirements) VALUES (#{deviceName}, #{modelNumber}, #{category}, #{manufacturer}, #{registrationCert}, #{costPrice}, #{unitPrice}, #{storageRequirements})
mapper.update:
UPDATE medicaldevices SET
DeviceName = #{deviceName},
ModelNumber = #{modelNumber},
Category = #{category},
Manufacturer = #{manufacturer},
RegistrationCert = #{registrationCert},
CostPrice = #{costPrice},
UnitPrice = #{unitPrice},
StorageRequirements = #{storageRequirements}
WHERE DeviceID = #{deviceID}
mapper.select:
select * from medicaldevices
status = 1
and DeviceName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.deviceName}, '%')
AND Category = #{params.category}
AND Manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.manufacturer}, '%')
